offer: For restaurant CFOs managing 10-20 suppliers, inaccurate demand forecasting causes excess inventory and waste. We provide inventory optimization software instead of manual inventory tracking and supplier negotiations.
problem: Inaccurate demand forecasting leading to excess inventory and waste.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where restaurant CFOs ask for help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 restaurant CFOs with a demo video
Community forums where restaurant CFOs share tools
try_it: Let users try forecasting tools on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
